data.title: Spark Sees $2.4 Billion Net Inflows as Capital Exits Aave
data.description: Spark has experienced significant net inflows totaling approximately $2.4 billion, according to NS3.AI. This movement of capital comes as funds are being withdrawn from Aave. Notably, at least 20 addresses have each deposited over $20 million into Spark, highlighting a substantial shift in investment.

data.title: The 10-day streak of net inflows ended yesterday, with the Ethereum spot ETF experiencing a total net outflow of $75.936 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $75.936 million yesterday (April 23rd, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH), with a net inflow of $19.7581 million. ETH's historical total net inflow has reached $1.926 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net outflow of $51.2987 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.341 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $13.713 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.89%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.979 billion.

data.title: Charles Schwab Introduces Direct Bitcoin and Ether Trading on Brokerage Platform
data.description: Charles Schwab has initiated a phased rollout of direct spot trading for Bitcoin and Ether within its brokerage platform, which manages $11.9 trillion in client assets. According to NS3.AI, Schwab's Q4 2025 earnings report indicated 38.5 million active brokerage accounts. The custody of these digital assets is managed by Charles Schwab Premier Bank, while Paxos handles the execution of trades. The service imposes a fee of 75 basis points per trade. It is important to note that cryptocurrencies held through Schwab are not protected by FDIC deposit insurance or SIPC protection.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Stocks Show Mixed Performance as Tech Stocks Rebound
data.description:
On April 24, Hong Kong's major stock indices opened lower but showed a recovery trend by midday, according to Jin10. The Hang Seng Tech Index turned positive just before the midday break. By the close of the morning session, the Hang Seng Index had fallen by 0.2%, while the Hang Seng Tech Index rose by 0.34%.

Some previously declining heavyweight tech stocks showed signs of recovery. Baidu (09888.HK) saw a sharp increase of over 2%, while Alibaba (09988.HK) also turned positive. Tencent Holdings (00700.HK), Xiaomi Group (01810.HK), and JD.com (09618.HK) experienced declines of less than 1%.

Semiconductor stocks showed significant gains, with Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) leading the rise. Additionally, stocks in the oil sector, brain-computer interface concept stocks, and robotics concept stocks also saw increases.

data.title: Spark Introduces Comprehensive Risk Management Features
data.description: Spark has unveiled a detailed overview of its risk management features. According to PANews, Spark Savings Vault is supported by multiple layers of first-loss capital and liquidity protection. Additionally, SparkLend's currency market employs multiple oracles and rate limits to safeguard user assets.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $223 million yesterday, marking the seventh consecutive day of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $223 million yesterday (April 23rd, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF IBIT saw the largest single-day net inflow with $167 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $167 million. Following closely were Ark Invest and 21Shares' ARKB ETF, with a combined net inflow of $71.2238 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $1.619 billion. Conversely, the Fidelity ETF FBTC saw the largest single-day net outflow with $16.9254 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.035 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $102.793 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) is 6.59%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $58.213 billion.

data.title: CoinList Partners with Superstate for Blockchain-Based Stock Issuance
data.description: CoinList has announced a partnership with Superstate's blockchain equity issuance platform, Opening Bell. According to Foresight News, this collaboration will enable users to purchase newly issued stocks directly using stablecoins and hold real equity on-chain, allowing for instant and direct settlement. The first batch of issuances is expected to launch in the second quarter of 2026, with a waitlist registration currently open.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Hong Kong AI Stocks Experience Sharp Decline
data.description: Hong Kong's stock market witnessed a significant downturn in AI concept stocks. According to Jin10, MINIMAX-W (00100.HK) saw a sharp drop of nearly 5%, while Zhipu (02513.HK) experienced a decline of over 7% at one point.

data.title: Nous Research Releases Hermes Agent v0.11.0 with Enhanced User Interface
data.description: Nous Research, an open-source artificial intelligence company, has announced the release of Hermes Agent v0.11.0. According to Foresight News, the latest update primarily focuses on improving the interface and user experience. Users can upgrade immediately by executing the hermes update command.

data.title: Copper Prices Decline Amid Supply Surplus Expectations
data.description: Copper prices fell in early trading as the market anticipates a supply surplus. According to Jin10, the recovery pace at Freeport's Grasberg mine has been slower than expected, with operations currently restored to only about 65%. This raises questions about whether copper prices can stabilize.

data.title: European Stock Futures Experience Decline Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: European stock futures have shown a downward trend, with the Euro Stoxx 50 index futures falling by 0.92%. According to ChainCatcher, the UK's FTSE 100 index futures experienced a decline of over 1%, while Germany's DAX 30 index futures decreased by 0.5%. These movements reflect ongoing market uncertainties impacting European financial markets.

data.title: Audiera to Unlock 21.25 Million BEAT Tokens on May 1
data.description: Audiera (BEAT) is set to unlock approximately 21.25 million tokens on May 1 at 9:00 AM UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $11.97 million. The data comes from the Web3 asset data platform RootData.

data.title: EigenCloud to Unlock 38.35 Million Tokens on May 1
data.description: EigenCloud (EIGEN) is set to unlock approximately 38.35 million tokens on May 1 at 5 a.m. UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $7.03 million. The token unlock is part of the platform's ongoing schedule to release tokens into the market.

data.title: Swarm Network to Unlock 107.64 Million Tokens on May 1
data.description: Swarm Network is set to unlock approximately 107.64 million tokens on May 1 at 0:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the network's ongoing distribution plan.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Arthur Hayes Predicts AI Asset Could Surpass Ethereum by 2030
data.description: Arthur Hayes, a prominent figure in the cryptocurrency industry, has forecasted that an AI-related asset might replace Ethereum in the top three cryptocurrencies by 2030. According to NS3.AI, Hayes emphasized that this prediction is a long-term market outlook rather than an indication of any immediate changes in the current cryptocurrency rankings. Hayes's statement highlights the potential impact of AI technologies on the future landscape of digital currencies.

data.title: Deepseek Launches New AI Model Iterations
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Deepseek has introduced its latest AI model iterations, deepseek-v4, on its official website. The update includes detailed information about the deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro models, marking a significant advancement in AI technology.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Speak at Florida Cryptocurrency Conference
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump is set to deliver a speech at a cryptocurrency conference in Florida on Saturday. According to BlockBeats, the White House confirmed the event scheduled for April 24.

Previous reports indicated that Trump will host a grand luncheon for TRUMP token holders, with the President himself attending alongside 18 'superstars.' The top 297 token holders will be granted access to the luncheon at Mar-a-Lago on April 25, while the top 29 holders will receive invitations to a special VIP reception and champagne toast, where they will have the opportunity to share the stage with President Trump.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Chip Stocks Surge with Notable Gains
data.description: Hong Kong's chip stocks experienced a rapid surge today. According to Jin10, Nexchip Microelectronics (02676.HK) saw an increase of over 13%. Meanwhile, Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) rose by more than 7%, and Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corporation (00981.HK) gained over 5%.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Prices Decline to $4,680 per Ounce
data.description: Gold prices experienced a downward trend, reaching $4,680 per ounce, marking a 0.28% decrease within the day. According to Jin10, the market has seen fluctuations as investors react to various economic indicators and geopolitical developments. The decline in gold prices reflects ongoing volatility in the precious metals market.

data.title: Balancer Attacker Resurfaces After Five Months of Inactivity
data.description:
On April 24, an attacker previously involved in a significant theft from Balancer has become active again. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the attacker, who had stolen nearly $120 million, is now laundering funds by converting ETH to BTC through THORChain.

In the past hour, the attacker has transferred 1,100 ETH and is in the process of converting it to BTC.
